import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_lcs_length_diagonal_update_bug():
    # Bug: on character match, code uses dp[i-1, j] instead of dp[i-1, j-1]
    # This uses the cell above (same column) instead of the diagonal cell,
    # preventing proper extension of previous matches
    assert source.lcs_length('ABCBDAB', 'BDCAB') == 2
